Home About

The Studio

About Us

We're a small indie studio focused on crafting Minecraft modpacks and mods.

Our Mission

FabiMvurice Interactive creates modpacks that blend curated mod selections with polished experiences. From the Create-powered engineering of the F&M series to the Vanilla+ charm of Additions, every project is built with care and community feedback.

We believe modded Minecraft should be accessible, performant, and fun... whether you're a seasoned engineer or loading your first modpack.

The Team

Who We Are

Itzz_Fabi

Founder & Lead Developer

Creator of the Create F&M series and Additions. Passionate about modded Minecraft and building communities.

Mvurice

Founder

Also had the idea to create the F&M series.

Our Journey

Milestones

2023

The First Project

Fabi and Maurice had the idea to create a Modpack. Create F&M was born.

2024

Founded FmStudios

Fabi and Maurice called themselves "FmStudios"

2024

First 10K Downloads

Crossed 10,000 combined downloads across CurseForge and Modrinth.

2024

Kinetic Partnership

Partnered with Kinetic Hosting to offer optimized modded Minecraft servers.

2025

Create F&M 3

Their biggest Modpack ever released. Create F&M 3 was very popular with many people joining their official community server

2025

Changed name to FabiMvurice Interactive

Fabi and Maurice wanted a new name and style.

2026

Create Unbound

The next evolution of the Create series | currently in development.

Our Stack

Tools & Platforms

Minecraft
NeoForge
Fabric
Create Mod
CurseForge
Modrinth
Java
Astro

FabiMvurice Interactive

Creating amazing Minecraft modpacks, mods, and resource packs. From Create-based tech packs to Vanilla+ experiences.
